result.text:
Hey everyone! I have @DriverzWorld collectibles that I want to give away to brand new owners for FREE. All you need is a @flow_blockchain wallet. Don't have one?

Download Flow Wallet on iOS/Google:
https://t.co/vOJuvCQysH

Once your account is setup, on the first tab press the "+" button & add VROOM Token. On the 2nd tab press the "+" button & add both of our main collections: Driverz & CarClub. Once done, drop your wallet address below 👇

I will be sending out collectibles & VROOM to new holders all F1 off-season. Already own our Genesis or Car Club collection? Help spread the news about this new promotion with a like/repost/Vroom Vroom and show em' what you're holding onto! We appreciate you all. Vroom Vroom 🏁

https://t.co/POBIHCWTNX
